heading: Fellowship and exchange programs
label: 7907 Fellowship and exchange programs
text: The Secretary of State, in coordination with the Secretary of Energy, the Secretary of Commerce, and the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency, shall carry out fellowship and exchange programs under which officials from developing countries visit the United States to acquire expertise and knowledge of best practices to reduce greenhouse gas intensity in their countries.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 2005section 739 of Pub. L. 101–240section 7901 of this title
